text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Someone's at the top of their game. Looking good, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I could say the same to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm looking forward to running with you all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Air Groove's aura is as intimidating as ever. And
Bright's presence is practically equal to hers...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Then there's Suzuka. With her fearsomely strong
legs and otherwordly speed, no other racer can
hold a candle to her.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (But I'm not racing against those three today.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(First, I have to conquer myself. I have to
overcome my weakness!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I recall correctly, you relish in races against
powerful opponents, don't you, Suzuka? The
stronger, the better, correct?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This will be an exciting race for you, then. I'm
certain you'll have an exhilarating time today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Let's see how well you can do, Dober!
